use_cases: Displaying image collections with hover-activated detail overlays for media galleries
E-commerce product cards revealing additional information on hover
Portfolio grids with interactive image previews and collection metadata
Content management interfaces showing media asset details on interaction
Dashboard cards displaying tile counts and collection statistics
ai_summary: A polished hover-detail card component featuring an image grid with smooth animations that reveal additional information on hover. Supports customizable buttons, pill badges with sparkle accents, and translucent glass-morphism styling. Built with Framer Motion for fluid transitions and Tailwind CSS for flexible theming. Ideal for media libraries, e-commerce galleries, and portfolio displays where interactive previews enhance user engagement.
